summaryAm: ሦስት ፍየሎች ወደ አረንጓዴ ሜዳ ለመሻገር በጥበብ የሚሰሩበት ተለሳለሰ ታሪክ።
moralAm: በጥበብ መነጋገር እና በመተባበር ችግርን መፍታት ይቻላል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ሦስት ፍየሎች በተራራ ዳር አብረው ይኖሩ ነበር። ትንሹ፣ መካከለኛው እና ትልቁ ፍየል በየቀኑ በቀስታ ይራመዱ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Three goats lived together near the mountain.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Three friendly goats near a mountain meadow, warm child-friendly storybook style.

pages.textAm: በእነሱ ያለው ሣር ትንሽ ሆነ። ከወንዙ ማዶ ግን ሰፊ አረንጓዴ ሜዳ በፀሐይ ይበራ ነበር።
pages.textEn: Their grass was small, but a green meadow shone across the river.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The goats looking across a river toward a bright green meadow.

pages.textAm: ወደ ሜዳው ለመሄድ አንድ የእንጨት ድልድይ መሻገር ነበረባቸው። ከድልድዩ በታች ጮኸኛ እንግዳ ብቻውን ተቀምጦ ነበር።
pages.textEn: They needed to cross a wooden bridge where a noisy stranger sat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A wooden bridge with a small grumpy but non-scary stranger below.

pages.textAm: ትንሹ ፍየል መጀመሪያ በቀስታ ተመራ። “እባክህ፣ ወደ ሜዳው ልሻገር?” ብሎ በጨዋነት ጠየቀ።
pages.textEn: The smallest goat asked politely to cross first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The smallest goat speaking politely on the bridge.

pages.textAm: እንግዳው “እኔስ ሣር የለኝም” ብሎ አጉረመረመ። ትንሹ ፍየል “እኛ ካገኘን እንካፈልሃለን” አለ።
pages.textEn: The stranger grumbled, and the small goat offered to share.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The small goat kindly offering to share meadow grass with the stranger.

pages.textAm: መካከለኛው ፍየል ሲመጣ እንግዳው እንደገና ጮኸ። መካከለኛው ፍየል ግን “በጩኸት ሳይሆን በንግግር እንፈታዋለን” አለ።
pages.textEn: The middle goat answered the noise with calm words.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The middle goat talking calmly on the bridge while the stranger listens.

pages.textAm: ትልቁ ፍየል መጨረሻ መጣ። “ሜዳው ለአንዳችን ብቻ አይደለም፤ ሁላችንም በሰላም እንጠቀምበት” ብሎ በልብ ያለ ቃል ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: The biggest goat invited everyone to share the meadow peacefully.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The largest goat calmly inviting everyone to share the meadow.

pages.textAm: እንግዳው ትንሽ ተረጋጋ። እሱም ብቻውን ስለነበር እንደሚጮኽ ተናገረ።
pages.textEn: The stranger calmed down and said he had felt lonely.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The bridge stranger looking calmer as the goats listen kindly.

pages.textAm: ፍየሎቹ እንግዳውን ከእነሱ ጋር ለመሻገር ጋበዙት። በድልድዩ ላይ በቀስታ ተጓዙ፣ ወንዙም በሰላም ይፈስ ነበር።
pages.textEn: The goats invited the stranger to cross with them.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The goats and the small stranger crossing the wooden bridge together.

pages.textAm: በአረንጓዴው ሜዳ ሁሉም ሣሩን ተካፈሉ። ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ ድልድዩ የጩኸት ቦታ ሳይሆን የጓደኝነት መንገድ ሆነ።
pages.textEn: In the green meadow, everyone shared and became friends.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The goats and the stranger sharing a sunny green meadow as friends.
